headings.usage: All section titles, hero headings, and major callouts. MUST be uppercase for top-level headings.

typography.instructions: Import 'Barlow Condensed' from Google Fonts. Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings.

primary.name: Fluxy Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key brand elements.

secondary.name: Slate Obsidian
secondary.usage: Headings, footer background, strong contrast elements.

accent.name: Safety Amber
accent.usage: Call to action highlights, 'New' badges, delivery status icons. Use sparingly.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-24 for sections. Gap-8 for grids.
layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for features. Asymmetrical split for Hero.

buttons.style: Sharp corners or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast.
buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide py-4 px-8
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 hover:border-blue-600 text-slate-900 font-semibold py-4 px-8

cards.style: Flat, white background, 1px border (border-slate-200). Hover: shadow-xl and border-blue-600 transition-all duration-300.

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-600 rounded-md h-12

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle SVG dot pattern or map topography in background sections (opacity 0.05).
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-lg for floating elements. shadow-sm for cards.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React. Use stroke-width={1.5} for a clean, technical look.

hero_bg.alt: Heavy cargo truck on African road
hero_bg.usage: Hero section right side or background with overlay.

app_context.usage: Driver section or 'How it works' visual.

hero.content: Left: Headline 'La Logistique B2B Simplifiée pour le Congo'. Subhead: 'Transportez vos marchandises lourdes en toute sécurité.'. CTAs: 'Télécharger l'App' (Primary), 'Devenir Chauffeur' (Secondary). Right: Hero Image.

items.title: Suivi en Temps Réel
items.desc: Visualisez votre cargaison à chaque étape.

items.title: Support 24/7
items.desc: Une équipe dédiée à votre écoute.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
